inputs.label: Direct Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total planned direct labor hours for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned direct labor hours for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).

inputs.label: Average Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average hourly rate including wages, benefits, and overhead per ISO 15686-5.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average hourly rate including wages, benefits, and overhead per ISO 15686-5.

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of raw materials and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of raw materials and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.

inputs.label: Equipment & Tooling Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or rental.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or rental.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect cost rate (facilities, utilities, management) as a percentage of direct costs, per standard cost accounting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect cost rate (facilities, utilities, management) as a percentage of direct costs, per standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Project Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts cost based on project complexity (low/medium/high) per PMI and Lean principles.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjusts cost based on project complexity (low/medium/high) per PMI and Lean principles.

inputs.label: Quality Level (Sigma)
inputs.businessContext: Target quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden costs.

inputs.label: Apply Lean Standardization
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies lean waste reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and material).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies lean waste reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and material).

rules.message: Direct labor hours must be greater than zero.
Labor rate must be greater than zero.
Overhead percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Complexity factor must be low, medium, or high.
Quality level must be 3, 4, 5, or 6 sigma.

thresholds.message: Projected cost exceeds $500,000. Consider value engineering review.
High labor hours detected. Evaluate automation or lean improvements.
Material cost is high. Consider alternative sourcing or bulk discounts.
